problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
